hero.sub: I’m Anmol Chandiok — a video editor & motion designer crafting reels, brand films, and scroll-stopping short-form that feel premium on every screen.
hero.marquee: Premiere Pro, After Effects, Color, Sound Design, Reels, Brand Films, Motion Graphics

work.title: Frames that earn the scroll.
work.sub: A mix of short-form heat, brand polish, and motion that sells the story.

services.title: What I deliver.
services.item1Body: Hook in 1 second. Retention edits, captions, platform-native cuts for IG, YT Shorts & TikTok.
services.item2Body: Story-led edits with cinematic pacing, sound design, and color that matches your brand world.
services.item3Body: Logo reveals, title sequences, lower thirds, and animated identities in After Effects.
services.item4Body: Look development, consistency across multi-clip packages, export for web, ads, and 4K.

about.title:
Editor by craft.
Director of feeling.
about.p1: I treat every cut like a decision the viewer will feel — even if they never notice it. From real-estate luxury reels to knowledge-center socials and product stories, I build edits that look expensive and move fast.
about.p2: Tools I live in: Premiere Pro, After Effects, color, sound, and a ruthless timeline.
about.li1: Vertical + landscape delivery from one story

process.title: From raw to ready.
process.step1Body: Goals, references, platforms, aspect ratios, and the feeling you want people to leave with.
process.step2Body: Structure, hooks, and story first. You’ll see the bones before the polish.
process.step3Body: Motion, grade, sound, captions — then exports for every format you need.
process.step4Body: Master files + platform-ready cuts. Optional thumbnails and cutdowns.

contact.title: Let’s make something people finish watching.
contact.sub: Tell me about your project — reels, brand film, motion package, or ongoing content.

footer.tagline: Video editor · Motion designer · Built for every screen
